resultList.dtldesc: Well-Located 2 BHK Apartment for Sale in Gota, AhmedabadPresenting a ready-to-move 2 BHK apartment in Gota, Ahmedabad, situated within the well-maintained Shripad Residency. This semi-furnished home offers a comfortable and convenient lifestyle, ideal for families seeking modern amenities, secure surroundings, and excellent connectivity. With its thoughtful layout and proximity to essential services, this apartment ensures both functional living and long-term value.Property SpecificationsThe apartment is located on the 4th floor of a 12-storey building and offers a carpet area of 1125 sq. ft. It features two spacious bedrooms and two bathrooms, complemented by a single balcony that overlooks a serene garden and play area. The living and dining areas are combined for an open-plan feel, while the semi-furnished modular kitchen without chimney allows for flexible customization. The floors are finished with vitrified tiles, and the property is West-facing, adhering to Vastu principles. Covered parking is available for one vehicle, enhancing convenience and security.FacilitiesShripad Residency offers a host of modern amenities designed for comfortable urban living. Residents have access to power backup, two lifts, a clubhouse, gymnasium, park, reserved parking, and 24-hour security with CCTV surveillance. Additional facilities include internetWi-Fi connectivity, banquet hall, piped gas, jogging and strolling tracks, outdoor tennis courts, multipurpose hall, indoor games room, kids play area, and fire fighting equipment. The building also features an RFID-controlled gate for secure access, ensuring peace of mind for all residents.LocalityGota is a well-connected neighbourhood in Ahmedabad, with easy access to the Sardar Patel SC Highway. The apartment is close to multi-speciality hospitals within 600 meters and several other healthcare facilities within 12 km. Educational institutions, including schools within 1 km, provide convenience for families. Proximity to shopping areas, banks, and public transport makes commuting and daily living seamless, while the surrounding greenery and planned open spaces add to the residential appeal.This 2 BHK apartment in Gota combines modern amenities, strategic location, and a semi-furnished interior, making it an excellent choice for homebuyers seeking comfort, security, and a well-rounded lifestyle in Ahmedabad.
